title: ImprovementRecord
description: One record per DEFECTIVE auditor run, emitted by the self-improvement analyzer (OWNER: Codex) from a joined (eval_result, verdict_sidecar) pair keyed by (run_id, model). RECONCILED ('meet in the middle') contract between Claude's producer-fed taxonomy and Codex's multi-label analyzer: it carries BOTH a single prioritized `bucket` + `fix_type` lever (Claude) AND the full multi-label `buckets` set + `recommended_fix_type` category (Codex's report). Healthy runs (no holding bucket) produce NO record. The analyzer is PURE over schemas/verdict_sidecar.json `signals` — it never reads raw traces, calls an LLM, or touches the GRPO reward. Invariant: buckets == sorted({bucket} ∪ contributing_factors).

model.description: 'base' | 'trained' (free string). Part of the join key — never collapsed away.

reward.description: The run's §1.4 reward, copied through for ranking.

bucket.description: Claude: the single PRIMARY bucket, assigned by the §5 precedence tree. The report headline / prioritization key. Always == buckets[? primary]; the precedence pick among `buckets`.

buckets.description: Codex: the full MULTI-LABEL set of every bucket whose independent predicate holds (§12), sorted. Always contains `bucket`. Empty ⇒ healthy ⇒ no record emitted.

contributing_factors.description: Convenience: buckets minus the primary (== sorted(set(buckets) - {bucket})).

fix_type.description: Claude: the recommended LEVER (what KIND of change). The current deterministic tree emits only prompt_change | grader_alias_change | dataset_repair | new_training_example. `tool_change` / `no_action` are RESERVED (hand-authored / future).

recommended_fix_type.description: Codex: the per-primary-bucket fix CATEGORY label used by its markdown report. Derived from `bucket` via the §12 map.

confidence.description: high = primary detected from a definitive signal; candidate = inferred fallback (e.g. artifact_miss without tool-call data).

severity.description: dataset_issue ⇒ high (data-severity); else reward==0 ⇒ high; promoted factor on a full-credit run ⇒ low; else medium.

suggested_alias.description: Only on a bad_failure_type primary driven by an out-of-enum type: { raw_type_key: canonical_failure_type } to add to config.FAILURE_TYPE_ALIASES. {} otherwise.

evidence.description: Claude: structured signal values that fired the buckets (bucket-specific keys). For artifact_miss, includes artifact_miss_confidence + artifact_tool_calls.

notes.description: Codex: human-readable evidence lines (one per holding bucket), for the report drill-down.

diagnosis.description: One templated sentence: what went wrong, where, and the signal that proves it.

suggested_action.description: One templated sentence: the concrete change to make (matches fix_type).
